latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing still does not visually match the same-name reference drawing; the dimension and notes/title areas differ substantially.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: The four expected views are present and roughly follow the reference front/top/right/iso placement.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: The dimension scheme still differs from the reference; lifecycle evidence reports final missing targets overall_height and hole_diameter after the prune guard.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension text and leaders remain crowded around the main/top views, including long diagonal leader geometry unlike the reference's clean dimension lanes.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Lower-sheet title/data placement and compact reference style are still not visually equivalent.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Technical notes are present but do not match the reference note placement, style, or manufacturing-readiness expectation closely enough for release.

latest_manual_findings: Application Drawing Review screenshot confirms the generated drawing is still not acceptable for manufacturing review.
The new post_layout_prune_guard ran, but final evidence still loses overall_height and hole_diameter target coverage.
The primary visible blocker remains dimension lane placement and readability around the main/top views.
